title: 样品确认、修改和大货前批准
theme: 从 sample approval / sample revision / proceed 开始
goals: 能引导客户确认样品并给出明确反馈
能处理客户要求修改样品的场景，并说明修改会影响时间
能在客户批准样品后，自然衔接到大货生产

review.title: Day 12 复习
items: 昨天练了 mold cost、mold making、mold ownership、prototype 和 exclusive。
今天继续模具后的下一步：样品确认、样品修改和大货前批准。
客户看样品时，不能只问 OK 吗，要引导客户确认颜色、尺寸、logo、包装和是否可以 proceed。

preview.scenario: 模具或样品完成后，你需要把样品发给客户确认；客户可能批准、要求修改，或只说 looks good 但没有明确批准大货。
needToKnow: sample approval 是大货生产前的关键节点，要拿到明确确认。
sample revision 表示样品修改，通常会影响时间和费用。
proceed 用于确认下一步动作，例如 proceed with bulk production。

vocabulary.meaning: 样品批准 / 样品确认通过
vocabulary.usage: 用于客户确认样品后进入大货生产。
vocabulary.example: We can start bulk production after sample approval.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户要求调整样品颜色、尺寸、logo 或包装。
vocabulary.example: The sample revision will take about 5 days.

vocabulary.usage: 用于大货生产前最终确认的样品。
vocabulary.example: We can arrange a pre-production sample before bulk production.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户对样品、报价或文件的意见。
vocabulary.example: Please share your feedback after checking the sample.

vocabulary.usage: 用于描述产品、样品、包装或设计的修改。
vocabulary.example: This modification may affect the sample lead time.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户说明想要的颜色、logo 位置或外观效果。
vocabulary.example: Please send us a reference photo for the logo position.

vocabulary.usage: 用于确认最终样品、设计稿或包装版本。
vocabulary.example: Please confirm if this is the final version.

vocabulary.usage: 用于确认是否进入下一步，如大货生产或付款安排。
vocabulary.example: Can we proceed with bulk production after your approval?

sentences.label: 请求样品反馈
sentences.natural: Please check the sample and let us know your feedback.
sentences.business: Please check the sample carefully and share your feedback so we can confirm the next step.

sentences.label: 确认样品批准
sentences.business: Could you please confirm if the sample is approved so we can proceed with bulk production?

sentences.label: 说明样品修改时间
sentences.natural: The sample revision will take about 5 days.
sentences.business: The sample revision will take about 5 days after we confirm the modification details.

sentences.label: 请求参考图片
sentences.natural: Please send us a reference photo.
sentences.business: Please send us a reference photo so we can adjust the logo position correctly.

sentences.label: 确认最终版本
sentences.business: Could you please confirm if this is the final version before we arrange bulk production?

chatAnalysis.problem: 太短，客户可能只说 looks good，但没有明确批准大货。
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Could you please confirm if the sample is approved so we can proceed with bulk production?

chatAnalysis.problem: 没有说明需要多少时间，也没有说明从什么时候开始算。
chatAnalysis.better: The sample revision will take about 5 days.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: The sample revision will take about 5 days after we confirm the modification details.

chatAnalysis.problem: 不够具体，客户不知道你需要什么类型的图片。
chatAnalysis.better: Please send us a reference photo for the logo position.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Please send us a reference photo and mark the logo position clearly, so we can adjust the sample correctly.

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：请求样品反馈

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The sample has been sent. Please check it carefully and share your feedback.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, we will check it today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Please confirm if the color, size, logo, and packaging are correct.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Sure, I will confirm after checking.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：客户批准样品

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The sample looks good.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Could you please confirm if the sample is approved?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Yes, the sample is approved.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Great. We will proceed with bulk production based on the approved sample.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户要求修改样品

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need to change the logo position on the sample.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: No problem. Please send us a reference photo and mark the logo position clearly.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Will this delay the order?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The sample revision will take about 5 days after we confirm the modification details.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：从样品反馈到修改和大货批准

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Hi, the sample has been delivered. Have you had time to check it?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Yes, we checked it today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Could you please share your feedback?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The size and color are good, but the logo position needs to be changed.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. Please send us a reference photo and mark the logo position clearly.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I will mark it on the photo and send it to you.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Great. After we receive the reference photo, we will check the modification with our sample team.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: How long will the sample revision take?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The sample revision will take about 5 days after we confirm the modification details.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you make it faster?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will check the fastest revision time with our sample team and update you today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Do we need another pre-production sample?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, I suggest arranging a pre-production sample before bulk production.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why do we need it?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Because we need to confirm the final version before bulk production.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If the revised sample is good, can we approve it directly?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes. If the revised sample is approved, we can proceed with bulk production.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please make sure the logo position is exactly the same as our reference photo.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Of course. We will adjust it according to your reference photo and send photos for confirmation.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you send photos before shipping the revised sample?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, we can send photos before shipping the revised sample.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: After approval, how soon can you start bulk production?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: After sample approval and deposit confirmation, we can start bulk production.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please send us a final summary before production.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will send the final version details for your confirmation before we proceed.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Okay, we will confirm as soon as we receive it.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. Once you approve the final version, we will proceed with bulk production.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：请确认样品是否批准。
exercises.answer: Please confirm if the sample is approved.
acceptable: please confirm if the sample is approved
could you please confirm if the sample is approved

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：sample ok?
exercises.answer: Could you please confirm if the sample is approved?
acceptable: could you please confirm if the sample is approved
please confirm if the sample is approved
exercises.hint: 要得到明确 approval，不只是 looks good。

exercises.prompt: 填空：The sample ____ will take about 5 days.
exercises.hint: sample revision 表示样品修改。

exercises.prompt: 客户要求改 logo 位置，哪个回复更适合？
options: Please send us a reference photo and mark the logo position clearly.
exercises.answer: Please send us a reference photo and mark the logo position clearly.
acceptable: please send us a reference photo and mark the logo position clearly
exercises.hint: 要让客户给 reference photo 并标清楚位置。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：样品批准后，我们可以开始大货生产。
exercises.answer: After sample approval, we can start bulk production.
acceptable: after sample approval we can start bulk production
after the sample is approved we can start bulk production
exercises.hint: bulk production 表示大货生产。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：The sample looks good. 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: Thank you. Could you please confirm if the sample is approved so we can proceed with bulk production?
acceptable: thank you could you please confirm if the sample is approved so we can proceed with bulk production
could you please confirm if the sample is approved so we can proceed with bulk production
exercises.hint: looks good 不等于正式批准，要确认是否可以 proceed。

homework: 把 sample approval、sample revision、feedback、modification、proceed 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍。
跟读长对话 2 遍，重点练样品修改和大货前批准。
tomorrow: Day 14 会练表面处理、Logo 工艺和颜色确认。
